set.body: One script: benchmark-cholesky-runtime.R. Ops: chol, chol_solve. Rehab per contract. chol is already executed in benchmark-regression.R dispatch but is not baselined <e2><80><94> this ticket both rehabs the orphan and closes that gap. Add accuracy check: recomputed norm(L L^T - A) / norm(A) must be below tolerance. Add baseline rows.
set.title: Rehabilitate Cholesky benchmark (cholesky-runtime)
